titleStmt.title: SII 16.285: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 285. (A.R. No. 542 of 1909.) AMĪNĀBĀD, SATTENAPALLI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the wall, right of the entrance into the central shrine of the Durgi temple on the top of the hillock.
The record is dated in Śaka 1496, Bhāva, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, Lunar eclipse corresponding to 1574 A.D., June 4, Friday.

It records the gift of half of the village Mullaṅgūru in Koṇḍvīḍu-sīma for worship and offerings to the goddess Durgāparamēśvarī of the village by Bokkasam Nāgappanāyaka, son of Kṛishṇappa-nāyaka and grandson of Koṇḍama-nāyaka of chaturthagōtra, exclusive of the dēvamānya lands already granted to the temples and stipulating that the revenue and produce of half the village granted to the goddess should go to the temple and the rest to the palace.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1496 Agunēṁ
ṭi bhāvasaṁvatsara jyēṣṭa śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīra śrīraṁgarāyadēva mahārāyalavāru ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāmrā
jyamu śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu durgāparamēśvariyaina mullagūriśa ktiki caturthagōtrapavi
tṛṁḍaina bokkesaṁ koṁḍamanāyani pautṛṁḍaina kruṣṇamanāyaniṁgāri putṛṁḍaina
nāgapanāyaniṁgāru daṁḍaṁveṭṭi yiccina dharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu śrīraṁgarāyadēva
mahārāyalayyavāru mākupāliṁcci yiyyanavadhariṁccina koṁḍavīṭi sīmalōnu pūrvā
nanuṁḍi sāgivaccē mullaṁgūru grāmaṁ 1ki muṁnu kaṭaḍaprakāraṁ nagaridēvatā grāmā
latōḍi sarvamānya maḍipōṁgā sagamuṁnu rācanagariki sagamunnu kaṭaḍaganaka rāca nagariki sagamunnu
mī Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālakunnu samarpiṁstimi tathātithi sōmōparāgapuṇyakālamaṁdu sa
hiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakamugānu trivācakamugānu yistimi Ā grāmānagala nā
nā dhānyālunnu nānā rokhālunnu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu sarvvamānyaṁ Istimi sakala
bhōgālnu Anubhaviṁccumani Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnu
pālanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
